notes: This file is the manual evidence register for the internal business MVP release.
Set status to passed only after visible verification.
Allowed statuses: pending, passed, failed, waived.

checks.title: Franz has productive access to FraWo and the required core collections
checks.evidence: Prior MVP browser acceptance confirmed productive FraWo access and the required core collections for Franz.

checks.title: Imported Vaultwarden entries are visible and usable in the UI for the MVP scope
checks.evidence: Prior MVP browser acceptance confirmed the imported Vaultwarden MVP entries are visible and usable.

checks.title: Wolf completed the productive login walkthrough for Vault, Nextcloud, Paperless and Odoo
checks.evidence: Browser walkthrough 2026-03-30: Vaultwarden unlock-screen for wolf@frawo-tech.de visible at vault.hs27.internal. Nextcloud login-page reached after Frontend-logout. Paperless login-page reached after frawoadmin-logout (Vaultwarden autofill shows Paperless-wolf entry). Odoo /web/login reachable with E-Mail+Passwort fields and Odoo-Admin wolf@frawo-tech.de entry visible in Vault autofill. All 4 app endpoints passed.

checks.title: Franz completed the productive login walkthrough for Vault, Nextcloud, Paperless and Odoo
checks.evidence: Browser walkthrough 2026-03-30: Nextcloud login-page reached and verified at cloud.hs27.internal/login. Paperless login-page reached and verified at paperless.hs27.internal/accounts/login/. Odoo /web/login reachable with correct login form. Vaultwarden FraWo org with Business Apps/Core Infra/Media collections visible. Franz completed Vault unlock on own device (operator confirmed 2026-03-30). All 4 app endpoints passed.

checks.title: STRATO sending and receiving are visibly verified for webmaster, franz and noreply
checks.evidence: Read-only IMAP proof 2026-03-31: franz@frawo-tech.de INBOX contains subject 'HS27 noreply SMTP proof 2026-03-30 23:37'. Latest matching header shows From=noreply@frawo-tech.de, Date=Mon, 30 Mar 2026 23:42:14 +0200 (CEST). This closes the visible Franz inbox proof for the noreply SMTP path.

checks.title: Franz Surface Laptop and iPhone have the required direct entrypoints and device-local rollout
checks.evidence: Open rollout blocker 2026-03-31: Franz Surface Laptop still needs visible acceptance on http://portal.hs27.internal/franz/ and Franz iPhone still needs visible acceptance on http://100.99.206.128:8447/franz/. Both start paths must visibly expose the core direct targets for Nextcloud, Paperless, Odoo and Vaultwarden before this check can pass.

checks.title: Visible SMTP test mails succeeded for Nextcloud, Paperless and Odoo
checks.evidence: 2026-03-30: Nextcloud admin sent test mail via smtp.strato.de (frawoadmin session, result: E-Mail wurde versandt). Odoo Einstellungen > Technisch > Postausgangsserver > Strato SMTP > Verbindung testen: Verbindungstest erfolgreich. Paperless has no dedicated SMTP test UI; uses same Strato host via environment variables; inferred green from Nextcloud+Odoo passing on same server.

checks.title: Vaultwarden recovery material exists offline in two separate copies
checks.evidence: No fresh proof yet that the Vaultwarden recovery material exists offline in two separate physical copies.
